text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Concert ends to great<n>fanfare, capping
off a night of electric<n>emotions and song that
brought us all<n>closer together under one spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, students are<n>practicing for their
winning concerts<n>with vigor—even the backup
dancer<n>parts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Concert helped them<n>realize that they
want to dance with a<n>smile, no matter where they
stand on<n>stage. For their fans' sake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello drops by with a photo in<n>hand. She's
decided to use a group<n>shot of everyone smiling
as a poster<n>for next year's Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The space we created for runners<n>and fans to
converse through song<n>can't end as a one-time
thing. Hello<n>firmly declares her intent to forge a
new tradition.
